# Hervald

> Hervald is an operator-controlled agent fleet runtime. It coordinates
> commanders, workers, provider CLIs, channels, workspace files, approvals,
> telemetry, onboarding, and persistent memory.

Use this file as the concise agent-readable map. Prefer setup and operation
pages first.

## Setup

- [Docs home](index.md)
- [Quickstart](getting-started/quickstart.md)
- [Troubleshooting](troubleshoot.md)
- [Provider auth](operate/provider-auth.md)
- [Machines and workers](operate/machines.md)

## Concepts

- [Commanders](concepts/commanders.md)
- [Workers](concepts/workers.md)
- [Command Room](concepts/command-room.md)
- [Approvals](concepts/approvals.md)

## Operations

- [Workspace](operate/workspace.md)
- [Channels](operate/channels.md)
- [Provider auth](operate/provider-auth.md)
- [Machines and workers](operate/machines.md)

- [CLI reference](reference/cli.md)
- [API reference](reference/api.md)
- [Naming policy](reference/naming.md)
- [Full docs directory](docs-directory.md)
